//1: allowJs: true — existing .jsx files continue to compile unchanged.
//2: checkJs: false — don't type-check the .jsx tree; only .ts/.tsx.
//3: strict: true — hold new .tsx files to a high bar from day one.
//4: jsx: react-jsx — React 18 automatic runtime; no `import React`.
//5: moduleResolution: bundler — matches Vite's resolution semantics.
//6: noEmit: true — Vite/esbuild does the actual transpile; tsc is just the type checker.
